attributes.action: mandate helmet use for cyclist, scooter and e-bike riders
attributes.additional_details:
Head injuries are one of the leading causes of serious injury for cyclists, scooter and e-bike users, especially among children. According to the NHS, wearing a bike helmet reduces the risk of head injury by up to 85%  
Despite the clear benefits of helmet use, its alarming that the UK doesn't have a law mandating helmets for cyclist, scooter and e-bike users, implementing such a law will not only significantly reduce the number of tragic accidents involving children, but also foster a culture of a lifetime of safety
attributes.background: It's a nightmare that no grandparent ever wants to experience - watching their grandchild fall off their bike without a helmet , resulting in a rushed trip to A&E.  Unfortunately, this is reality and how crucial it is to ensure the safety of every child on the road and pavements needs highlighting.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition which calls for a similar action: https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/767256
